text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of separation yet curiosity. Watching the group through glass, I am both an observer and an outsider, aware of the boundaries between me and collective activity.

In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and displays about research and development, I am invigorated by human ingenuity. The environment stimulates thought and wonder about collaboration and technological progress. Being here fills me with anticipation to learn and reflect.
